case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. VS. HEATHER L. MAKRIS et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-10-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-10-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT MAKRIS, HEATHER L. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-20-2011
DECLARATION PER CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
NON-SERVICE/RETURN: SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-10-2011 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
